tspan.style: font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;font-weight:bold;font-stretch:normal;font-family:'Noto Emoji', 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Noto Sans', sans-serif;-inkscape-font-specification:'Noto Sans Bold'

svg.text: caps: SETUID · SETGID · CHOWN · DAC_OVERRIDE · FOWNER
no container-side iptables — proxy sidecar is sole enforcement
NET_RAW: ping · mtr · tcpdump (available after privilege drop)
bash shell on exit · no new privs · capabilities bounded
opt: Wayland / X11 socket (CLAUDIUS_CLIPBOARD=1, default on)
CLAUDE.md policy baked into image (highest precedence)
PID namespace isolated · no host env vars leaked
IPv6: identical · fallback: ip6tables FORWARD DROP if no SUBNET6
SO_ORIGINAL_DST · parse TLS SNI / HTTP Host
fnmatch ACL → ALLOW: relay bytes | BLOCK: close
parse IP header → IP-based ACL (hosts pre-resolved at startup)
extended by CLAUDIUS_ALLOW (proto suffix /tcp or /udp required)
UDP: wildcard hostnames not supported (IP-only ACL at NFQUEUE layer)
cleanup: atexit removes chains · stale chains pruned on next start
read-only: ps · logs · images · inspect · info · network ls · volume ls
opt write: run · build · stop · exec · ... (CLAUDIUS_DOCKER_WRITE=1)
intra-net traffic excluded from REDIRECT → always reachable
docker.sock never mounted directly into sandbox
